name: Timeout
short_description: Timeout is a fast-paced deck-building + team strategy game. Venture into a retro pixel-art style world, organize a team of up to 3 characters to build independent decks for them, challenge enemies on the timeline in ATB turn-based battles, and ultimately achieve victory
detailed_description:
Game Overview

Timeout is a fast-paced deck-building + team strategy game. Venture into a retro pixel-art style world, you must organize a team of up to 3 characters to build independent decks for them, flexibly use various tools and skills, make decisions within a limited time, challenge enemies on the timeline in ATB turn-based battles, and ultimately achieve victory

Game Features

  • ATB real-time turn-based combat: Your actions are not immediately effective, every turn, every card, and every action is crucial

  • Make a decision: Be prepared before the events on the timeline reach a critical time point. Resting the team, using skills or purchasing cards, you need to decide for yourself

  • Free deck building: Adjust your character's deck freely and build your own strategy. Can the character specialize in a certain skill or rely on greater attributes, focus on team collaboration, or form a one-man army?
  • Rich Cards and Characters: Gradually unlock 10 unique characters with their respective specialties, as well as over 500 unique cards that can be collected
  • Crazy Relics Effect: Unlock 10 powerful relics and change the gameplay of the game

Localization

English localization is under development, please do not hesitate to provide your feedback
